description: Official LaTeX one-page abstract template for the joint Euromech Colloquium on Data-Driven Fluid Dynamics and 2nd ERCOFTAC Workshop on Machine Learning for Fluid Dynamics (London, 2-4 April 2025). Provides a branded logo header with event title banner, centered title/author/affiliation block with superscript affiliation markers and corresponding-author email, figure support, and a numbered bibliography, based on the plain article class.
